Update Agent
Hi — I'm the pipeline Update Agent. Tell me what's changed on any deal and I'll draft the update: "Alfanar FEED slipped to Q4, now 60%", "we won the Berneck dryer", "Enviva bumped to $12M". You can also describe a brand-new opportunity. I'll show the change on the right before anything is saved.
Proposed changes
Updates appear here as we talk — review, then apply.

AgentJohn
Hey — I'm AgentJohn, your AI pipeline intake assistant. Tell me about a deal you're working on — don't worry about format, just talk naturally. What's the account and what are we selling them?

Bubble size = contract value · Opacity = probability · Color = category

Estimate history

How value, probability, and expected close move over time — and which opportunities are getting refreshed versus going stale. Field-level changes are captured as the team edits the pipeline; trajectories fill in from there.

Update coverage

Sorted by longest time since last update — the top rows are what nobody has touched.
